jobs.purpose: Hard-delete activity_log rows past their retention tier. Three passes per run (one per tier).
steps: Query: SELECT id FROM activity_log WHERE retention_tier = tier AND created_at < now() - tier_days LIMIT prune_chunk_size.
Loop until no rows returned for the tier.
jobs.notes: Runs daily 03:15 UTC. Idempotent — no-op when caught up.

jobs.purpose: Recompute retention_tier for existing rows when a workspace's plan changes. Bulk UPDATE + emit an anonymised metric row.
